coverage_note: 43 importing nations, 12 chokepoints, 13 commodities. Crude oil (2709) uses Tier 1 bilateral data. Routing corrected 2026-05-28: West Africa to Asia via Cape (MALACCA only, no Bab-el-Mandeb); Libya/Algeria to Asia via SUEZ+BABELMANDEB+MALACCA. Dependency % is commodity-specific (crude denominator = total crude imports, not cross-commodity).
